productName: Pastime Liquid Diamonds Disposable Vape - Hybrid - Super Runtz - 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Super Runtz oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of apricot, pear, and flowery, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
